ec2.description: Allows EC2 instances to assume the role.

event.description: Allows EventBridge to assume the role.

lambda.description: Allows Lambda functions to assume the role.

pod.description: Allows Kubernetes/OpenShift pods to assume the role via IRSA (OIDC). Renders one statement per parameter entry.

s3.description: Allows the S3 service to assume the role (e.g. for cross-region replication).

step-function.description: Allows Step Functions to assume the role.

custom/ec2-lambda.description: Custom trust policy allowing EC2 and Lambda to assume the role.

custom/eventbridge-lambda.description: Custom trust policy allowing EventBridge and Lambda to assume the role.
